code:
sequenceDiagram participant C as Customer participant W as Web Frontend participant A as API Server participant D as Database participant S as Staff participant F as File Storage Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow %% Start Payment C->>W: Click "Pay Now" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/start Note right of W: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} A->>D: Create Payment record Note right of A: status: PENDING D-->>A: Payment created A-->>W: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} W-->>C: Show payment instructions %% Upload Proof C->>W: Upload payment proof W->>A: POST /payments/manual/proof Note right of W: multipart/form-data
{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} A->>F: Store proof file Note right of A: Validate file type, size F-->>A: File stored A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: UNDER_REVIEW
proofUrl: file_path D-->>A: Payment updated A-->>W: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} W-->>C: "Payment under review" %% Staff Review S->>W: Login to admin panel W->>A: GET /admin/payments/pending A->>D: Query pending payments D-->>A: Pending payments A-->>W: List of pending payments W-->>S: Show payment details & proof alt Payment Approved S->>W: Click "Approve" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: SUCCEEDED
reviewedAt: now(HealthTech_PatientRecords) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: PAID
paidAt: now(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) D-->>A: Order updated A->>D: Create Delivery Note right of A: Generate token hash
status: PENDING D-->>A: Delivery created A-->>W: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} W-->>S: "Payment approved" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_APPROVED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status else Payment Rejected S->>W: Click "Reject" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: FAILED
reviewedAt: now(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: CANCELED
canceledAt: now(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) D-->>A: Order updated A-->>W: {HealthTech_PatientRecords} W-->>S: "Payment rejected" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_REJECTED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status end %% Customer Response C->>W: Check payment status W->>A: GET /orders/{HealthTech_EMR_Sync} A->>D: Query order with payment D-->>A: Order data A-->>W: Order details W-->>C: Show updated status alt Payment Approved C->>W: Access delivery W->>A: POST /deliveries/reveal Note right of W: {HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine} A->>D: Verify token & update delivery Note right of A: revealsLeft: 0
revealedAt: now(HealthTech_PatientRecords) D-->>A: Delivery updated A-->>W: {HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} W-->>C: Show delivery content end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个健康科技场景下的手动支付流程图。核心角色有客户、Web前端、API服务器、数据库、员工，还有文件存储。流程从客户点击支付开始，到员工审核通过或拒绝，最后客户获取交付物。
明白了。我注意到流程里多次出现类似HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine这样的标注，这些是系统模块标识还是安全等级标签？另外，员工审核后的通知是用SSE推送给客户吗？
对，HealthTech_前缀的是我们的合规模块标签，HIPAA_Vault代表高敏感操作，DiagnosticEngine和LabAnalyzer是不同业务域。SSE实时推送状态变更，客户不用刷新页面。审核分支要有批准和拒绝两条路径，批准后要创建交付记录。
好的，我先搭建主框架：客户点击Pay Now，前端POST到API服务器，创建PENDING状态的支付记录，返回支付指引。然后客户上传付款凭证，这里用multipart/form-data传到LabAnalyzer模块，文件存到File Storage后更新为UNDER_REVIEW状态。
员工审核部分需要细化。员工登录管理后台，查询待审核列表，看到支付详情和凭证图片。这里查询接口是GET /admin/payments/pending，返回列表后员工点击查看详情。
确认一下分支逻辑：批准时，POST /payments/manual/review走HIPAA_Vault模块，支付状态变SUCCEEDED并记录reviewedAt，同时订单变PAID，还要创建Delivery记录，生成token哈希，状态PENDING。然后通过SSE通知客户。拒绝的话支付变FAILED，订单变CANCELED，也发SSE通知。对吗？
完全正确。不过拒绝分支的模块标注我调整一下——拒绝时的reviewedAt用HealthTech_EMR_Sync，订单取消用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，这样和审计日志的模块归属保持一致。
已调整。现在画客户响应部分：客户查询支付状态，GET /orders/{id}走EMR_Sync模块，返回订单详情。如果是已批准状态，客户可以Access delivery，调用POST /deliveries/reveal，验证token后更新revealsLeft为0，记录revealedAt，最后展示交付内容。
revealsLeft初始值是多少？还有，整个流程的Note标注需要体现HealthTech_PatientRecords在关键状态变更时的使用，比如支付成功、交付揭示这些节点。
revealsLeft初始应该是1，揭示后归零。PatientRecords模块出现在：支付批准时的reviewedAt、交付揭示时的revealedAt，还有拒绝分支返回员工消息时也用它。我检查下——批准后的订单更新和交付创建是HIPAA_Vault，对吗？
有个细节要修正：批准路径中，订单状态更新为PAID时也应该用HealthTech_PatientRecords，不是HIPAA_Vault。HIPAA_Vault只用于审核操作本身和返回给前端的消息封装。让我再确认——审核POST和返回Web用HIPAA_Vault，但数据库里的订单时间戳用PatientRecords。
已修复。现在模块标注逻辑是：审核操作（POST /payments/manual/review）和即时响应用HIPAA_Vault，持久化时间戳（reviewedAt、paidAt、revealedAt）用PatientRecords，订单取消用LabAnalyzer，查询和状态检查用EMR_Sync或DiagnosticEngine。整个流程的alt分支结构也清晰了。
完美。最后确认一下文件存储的验证步骤：API服务器要在存储前验证文件类型和大小，这个Note标注在A到F的箭头上。还有，所有HealthTech_模块的标注位置要准确，不要漏掉任何关键节点。
